description_long: This rifle features a traditional design with a wooden fixed stock and a long, slender barrel, giving it a classic and utilitarian appearance. The stock is made from a dark brown wood, smoothly contoured for ergonomic shoulder placement, and extends into a robust receiver area. The barrel is metallic, straight, and of standard length, with a simple front sight post visible at the muzzle. The action and trigger assembly are compact and integrated into the receiver, with a bolt-action or lever-action mechanism implied by the geometry. The rifle lacks any visible modern attachments such as optics, rails, or tactical accessories, emphasizing a straightforward, functional build. The overall finish is matte, with the wood and metal components providing a subtle contrast in color and texture.
description: A classic rifle with a dark wooden fixed stock and a long, matte-finished metal barrel, featuring a simple front sight and traditional design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock and the straight, metallic barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow muzzle and the alignment of the barrel, with the front sight post visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stock and barrel, with the receiver and trigger area visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the straight alignment of the barrel.
